zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Burr於1510年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾霍爾 恩德時，她的父親Richard Burre31歲，母親Elizabeth Godrey25歲。她於大約1529年與John Maultbye在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1557年之後在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾厄普頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾盧斯。

nameMeanings.name: Burr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English burre ‘bur’ (a seed-case or flower-head with clinging prickles), used by Shakespeare to denote someone who sticks like a bur, a person difficult to ‘shake off’, a sense which may well be older.
German: topographic name from Burr(e) ‘mound, hill’, or in the south a variant of Burrer .

History: The American political leader Aaron Burr (1756–1836) was the son of a clergyman and academic, president of Princeton University. On his mother's side he was descended from the Puritan preacher Jonathan Edwards; on his father's from Jehu Burr, who emigrated from England to MA with John Winthrop (see   Winthrop  ) in 1630.

variants.name: Burrer
meanings: from an agent derivative of Middle High German burren ‘to buzz, complain’, probably applied as a nickname for a noisy or cantankerous person.
habitational name for someone from either of two places called Burren in Württemberg.

variants.name: Burrs
meanings: Altered form of English Burr , with the addition of excrescent -s, or perhaps of Burrows .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Burr was born in 1510, in Hall End, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Burre, was 31 and her mother, Elizabeth Godrey, was 25. She married John Maultbye about 1529, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1557, in Upton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Louth, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Burr est née en 1510, à Hall End, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Burre, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Godrey, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Maultbye environ 1529, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1557, à Upton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Louth, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Burrが1510年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアハル エンドで生まれた時，父Richard Burreは31歳，母Elizabeth Godreyは25歳であった。約1529年にイギリスイギリスでJohn Maultbyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1557年以後にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウプトンで死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアロウスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Burr(이)가 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 홀 드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Burre(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Godrey(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1529년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John Maultbye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 업턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 루스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Burr родилась в 1510 г. в местности холл энд, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Burre было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Godrey, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Maultbye около 1529 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1557 г. в местности уптон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности лоут, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
